title: Same-lap field-relative context
summary: Compare each car with the contemporaneous field on the same race lap for tyre age, pace, degradation, and position.
rationale: Field-relative features were broadly explored and often present in strong synthetic stacks, though not always dominant. Pit decisions are relative to competitors as well as absolute tyre state.
implementation_hint: Group by race-year/race and `LapNumber`, then add medians, ranks, percentile ranks, z-scores, and row-minus-field-median for `TyreLife`, `LapTime_Delta`, `Cumulative_Degradation`, `Position`, and `Position_Change`. Use current-lap values only.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Same-lap peer blocks had some implementation failures from index alignment; use transform-style group operations and preserve row order.
